sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91873" key="pursoe/liktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πυρσο-έλικτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n91873.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">writhing in fire</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Marin.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Procl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">28</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
